summary: A phone interview on The Glenn Beck Program with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons, who says HSI will investigate and track the money behind anti-ICE 'professional agitators' and groups like the John Brown Club. The visual is the radio host at his mic with a show graphic; it is a talk-show interview, not a produced music-driven montage.
notable_text: THE GLENN BECK PROGRAM; 'On the Phone — Todd Lyons, U.S. Immigration & Customs Enforcement Acting Director'
